## INTERPRETATION

Generations are treated as orthonormal branch-manifold modes.
QR restores the lost unitary structure after 6D -> 3D extraction.
CKM is a folded-vacuum mismatch; PMNS is a localized-vs-cyclic vacuum mismatch.
